job_description:
Job Title: Entry level Software Engineer

Responsibilities:
- Develop and maintain high-quality software applications and features [cite: 521].
- Write clean, scalable, and efficient code following industry best practices [cite: 521].
- Debug and troubleshoot software issues to improve system performance [cite: 521].
- Document technical processes and code logic for future maintenance and clarity [cite: 521].
- Collaborate with the team to design and implement technical solutions [cite: 521].

Requirements:
- Strong proficiency in programming languages such as Python, Java, or JavaScript [cite: 521].
- Solid understanding of Data Structures, Algorithms, and OOP concepts [cite: 521].
- Familiarity with version control systems like Git and GitHub [cite: 521].
- Basic knowledge of databases (SQL/NoSQL) and API integration [cite: 521].
- Ability to write clean, organized, and well-documented code with clear comments [cite: 521, 522].
- Experience in writing technical documentation and README files for projects[cite: 522].

candidate_cv.career_overview: I am seeking the challenging position with a technology company that will allow me to apply and enhance my skills of being Test Engineer to their fullest potential[cite: 432]. Possessing over 10 years of experience in the electronics manufacturing and test engineering environment can bring high level of responsibility and technical role in your company[cite: 433]. In addition, I am eager to contribute my creativity and hard work towards the success of your company and to the growth of the fast developing field[cite: 434].

education.degree: Associate Degree, Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics

responsibilities: Perform component debugging on the complex android mobile technology products with Android Debug commands[cite: 458].
Bring up ongoing reliability lab for the android device compliance testing that includes tumble test, drop test, button cycling test, thermal testing and humidity environment testing[cite: 459].
Troubleshoot and perform final root cause failure analysis on the component level for Riverbed Steelhead, Sturgeons, and Interceptors WAN optimization hardware appliances[cite: 460].

Responsible to perform functional test and system level validation, Report directly to the customer's quality engineering department with final failure analysis data results on RMA/FA systems[cite: 461].
Manage RMA returns and process orders[cite: 462].
Perform incoming quality check on the RMA systems[cite: 463].
Upgrade firmware or software if required[cite: 464].
Use test equipment tools Digital/Analog meters, Signal Generators, Oscilloscope Tektronix TDS 3052, Fluke 26III True RMS MM meter to find root cause on the electrical circuits[cite: 465].
TestExpert CAD for signal view[cite: 466].
Directly work with customer's engineers to resolve all test related issues and act as primary technical customer interface[cite: 467].
Prepare and develop test process procedures and disseminate test-engineering standards for developed test systems[cite: 468].
Measure and control test debug WIP[cite: 469].
Stay abreast of technology trends[cite: 470].
Design, develop, maintain test procedures, and tester software for electronic circuit board production[cite: 471].
Support junior technicians with failure analysis, tester debugging, reduction of intermittent failures[cite: 472].
Review test equipment designs, data and RMA issues with customers regularly[cite: 473].
Support backend production floor with BOM breakdown for Intel X-86 server platform, Created Visual Aids[cite: 474].
work instructions for assemblies from frontend to backend[cite: 475].
Properly implement ECO, ECN, Deviations, SPIs and ETN rework on the production floor[cite: 476].
Design barcode labels with loftware design software for assemblies and subassemblies[cite: 477].
Create MES routes for the assemblies and controlled process verification in the MES system[cite: 478].
Participate in Lean manufacturing eg[cite: 480].

The 5S's, Kaizen Blitz or Events, QRQC, Workflow Analysis, Layouts & workcell design, Kanban, Simulated continuous flow, De-bottlenecking, Takt Time and other process related inprovements, FPY reports for test matrix, Test Debug WIP reports[cite: 481].
Applied Lean Six Sigma methodologies to improve production process[cite: 482].
Work with Test and Manufacturing engineering departments for DFT and developed test programs[cite: 483].

Extensive experience in NPI environment and NPI process inmprovements, customer's NPI projects portfolio includes McAfee, Riverbed, HP, Silverspring networks, NEC, Cisco, Pocketfinder, Sunpower & Sable networks[cite: 484].
Traveled domestic and overseas to coach diagnostic technicians for new customers and existing customer product lines[cite: 485].
Responsible to create proposals, design Security Access Control, CCTV Surveillance System and Alarm Systems for Government, Commercial, and Residential customers[cite: 488].
Provided Technical Support to Field Technicians and customers[cite: 489].
Install GPS tracking devices on fleet vehicles[cite: 490].
Work directly with the company's Vice President of engineering on the development of alarm verification VIT system[cite: 493].
Support development of new production and R&D engineering department overseas with BOM breakdown, Visual Aids, Schematics[cite: 494].
improvements and US FCC compliance requirements[cite: 495].
Daily job duties included test and Troubleshoot CCTV Security products[cite: 496].
Performed electrical conformance testing with Agilent 83480A Digital Communication Analyzer[cite: 497].
Introduce new product lines to the customer and marketing department[cite: 498].
Provided Technical Support on all company products on phone and via email[cite: 499].
Test and troubleshoot flat touch screens and report daily test reports to engineering department[cite: 502].
Trained new employees to perform task on assembly lines[cite: 503].
Certified WWOPS Final Analysis Manufactured Training[cite: 506].
Ability to Test and Debugged all SUNFIRE mid and high series servers[cite: 507].
Generate daily work report on failed CPU boards and other components[cite: 508].
Experience in Assembly line, Kitting and pack out[cite: 509].
Assisted Manufacturing Engineers to installed and tested new features on a servers[cite: 510].
Interpret and very familiar with SUN Microsystems technical docs on Netscape interanet[cite: 511].
Directly work with Engineers on new customer products for Telecommunication Servers[cite: 514].
Performed test and repaired bad main boards, worked on SMT machines on a production[cite: 515].

core_skills: Digital/Analog and RF Circuits Design Techniques

certifications: Certified WWOPS Final Analysis Manufactured Training [cite: 506]
